items.headline: Anthropic confidentially files draft S-1 with SEC for IPO — $47B ARR run-rate, first AI lab to file
Ramp raises $750M at $44B led by Iconiq with Ontario Teachers' Pension Plan and GIC as co-leads
Generalist AI raises $400M at $2B led by Radical Ventures — Fei-Fei Li, Naval, Bezos Expeditions, Nvidia in cap table
Helion raises $465M Series G at $15.5B led by Thrive Capital — fusion power plant for Microsoft, Bill Ford participates
Supabase raises $500M at $10.5B led by GIC — open-source backend platform default for AI app builders
Suno raises $400M Series D at $5.4B led by Bond Capital — $300M ARR AI music, copyright lawsuits ongoing
Microsoft unveils MAI-Code-1-Flash at Build — first in-house coding model, lessens OpenAI dependence
AlphaSense raises $350M led by Vitruvian Partners at $7.5B — AI-native market intelligence workflow platform
Anthropic expands Project Glasswing — Claude Mythos preview to 150+ orgs in 15+ countries with Claude Security
S&P 500 falls ~2% on week, Nasdaq -4.7% as chipmakers led Friday rout; 10Y to 4.54% on hot May +172K payrolls
SpaceX prices the largest IPO in history at $135/share, raises ~$75B, closes +19% at $160.95 on Nasdaq debut; Musk becomes first trillionaire
Anthropic releases Claude Fable 5 — first public Mythos-class model — alongside restricted Mythos 5; hard safety rails fall back to Opus 4.8
Mach Industries raises $300M Series C at $1.8B led by Ribbit Capital and Infinite Capital — defense/hard-tech 'American Dynamism'
NinjaOne hits $12.3B valuation in ~$400M secondary share sale (from $5B in early 2025); Wellington, ICONIQ, CapitalG, Sequoia, NEA participate
PhysicsX raises $300M Series C led by Temasek — AI-driven physics simulators for hardware/engineering design
KPMG to deploy Microsoft Agent 365 + M365 Copilot across all 276,000 staff — largest professional-services agent rollout yet
Waymo scaling toward ~20 markets in 2026 with ~3,000-vehicle fleet; Tesla Robotaxi ~44 vehicles in Austin
Frontier-model cost curve bending down: MiniMax M3 cuts per-token compute to ~1/20th with faster decoding
Humanoid robotics moves pilot-to-platform: Figure 03 ramping ~1 robot/hour with BMW pilot; 1X opens NEO preorders; China fields 150+ firms
S&P 500 melts up to ~7,449 and Nasdaq rebounds on Iran peace/rate-cut hopes; SpaceX debut adds risk-on; 10Y ~4.48% into June 16-17 Fed meeting

Fed holds at 3.50-3.75% under new Chair Warsh but dot plot flips hawkish (median 2026 to ~3.8%, possible hike); S&P ends week ~7,500 (+1.6%, 9th straight gain), QQQ near record ~$740, 10Y ~4.46%; US-Iran peace deal signed
Y Combinator S26 Demo Day wraps June 16 — ~196 startups (AI agents/defense/robotics/infra), new $500K-in-USDC standard deal; standouts Uno Wallet, Silmaril
Odyssey raises $310M Series B at $1.45B for AI world models — led by Natural Capital with Amazon, AMD Ventures, GV, EQT, IQT; week's biggest round
US government orders Anthropic to suspend Fable 5 and Mythos 5 worldwide via export-control directive; Opus 4.8 stays live; Anthropic opens Seoul office days later
Sarvam becomes India's newest AI unicorn — $234M Series B first close at $1.5B, led by HCLTech ($150M, >10% stake) with Bessemer, Khosla, Peak XV
DeepSeek closes first outside round (~$7.4B) at $50B+ via founder-controlled LP with no voting rights, 5-year lockup; Tencent, CATL, national AI fund back
Twenty raises $100M Series B at $1B led by Accel — 'America's first VC-backed cyber-warfare startup' (offensive cyber for US military/IC)
Atom Computing raises $100M Series C (>$300M total) led by Third Point Ventures + signed LOI with US Dept. of Commerce for $100M — fault-tolerant neutral-atom quantum
Salesforce Summer '26: Agentforce Multi-Agent Orchestration goes GA on ~$800M ARR base; Cognizant wires ServiceNow agents into Neuro control plane
Hydra Host raises $100M for GPU marketplace with NVIDIA, ARK, Comcast Ventures, Founders Fund participating — AI-compute infrastructure financing
OpenAI launches Partner Network — $150M to certify ~300,000 consultants (Select/Advanced/Elite tiers) after restructuring Microsoft deal to sell direct
Pogačar opens 2026 Tour de Suisse with ~70km solo Stage 1 win (by 2:14 over Carapaz), seizes GC — 10th win in 12 race days ahead of Tour de France (July 4 start)
Nate Herk (w/ Cole): 'How to Build Effective Claude Code Agents in 2026' — planning + verification system for directing coding agents
Cambridge Judge Business School: 'Why human expertise still matters in the age of AI certainty' — the 'artificial certainty' expertise-illusion framing
